backlog.title: aios-action crate skeleton + S0.1 core types
acceptance_criteria: crates/aios-action/Cargo.toml created with workspace-inherited package settings
crates/aios-action/src/lib.rs with module declarations: envelope, id, phase, identity, request, execution, trace, error
Core types implemented per S0.1: ActionEnvelope, ActionId, ActionPhase, Identity, Request, Execution, Trace, ActionError
Closed-enum ActionPhase: Pending, Running, Succeeded, Failed, RolledBack
serde Serialize+Deserialize derived for all public types
One logical commit with structured commit message

backlog.title: aios-action canonical encoding + BLAKE3 hashing
acceptance_criteria: Canonical encoding via proto3 deterministic serialization OR JCS (RFC 8785) per S0.1 §8
BLAKE3 hashing helpers for request_hash, idempotency_hash
Tests verifying hash determinism across re-encodes

backlog.title: aios-action ULID-based ID generation per S0.1 §3.2
acceptance_criteria: ULID generation for act_<ulid>, intent_<ulid>, etc. (closed prefix set per S0.1 §3.2)
Prefix-namespace validation: reject colon-separated forms (W11-B constitutional rule)
